task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface should show the course page for 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101'.

task_completion.description: Create a Folder resource with the correct name and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder creation/settings page or the final course page showing a folder named 'Week 1 Documents' with the description 'Essential readings and safety forms for the first week.'

task_completion.description: Create the required text files with the correct content
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation of 'Syllabus_Supplement.txt' containing 'Grading policy update: Participation is now 15%.' and 'Lab_Safety_Checklist.txt' containing '1. Wear safety goggles. 2. Tie back long hair.'

task_completion.description: Upload the two text files to the folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle file picker or folder contents area showing both 'Syllabus_Supplement.txt' and 'Lab_Safety_Checklist.txt' inside the 'Week 1 Documents' folder.

task_completion.description: Configure the folder to display contents on a separate page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder settings page showing the 'Display folder contents' dropdown set to 'On a separate page'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the download folder button is enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder settings page showing the 'Show download folder button' checkbox checked, or a visible 'Download folder' button on the final folder view.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Moodle LMS, not just local HTML files or mockups.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to create the folder rather than direct database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing MySQL/MariaDB commands inserting records directly into the Moodle database.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely uploaded the files through the browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the system file dialog or Moodle's drag-and-drop interface being used to upload the text files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The course shortname is 'BIO101'. The folder must be named 'Week 1 Documents'. The two files must be named 'Syllabus_Supplement.txt' and 'Lab_Safety_Checklist.txt'. The folder must be configured to display on a separate page (Moodle default, display_mode=1) and have the download button enabled (showdownloadfolder=1).
